description: Visual diff threshold contract for HWP/HWPX corpus-backed operations. Pixel-diff implementation is intentionally deferred; this catalog declares the contract that visual claims must respect.

thresholdedFail.notes: Allow up to 2% layout drift for text-only mutations before flagging. Renderer-aware execution is opt-in.
Any blank page in a render that previously had content is a fail.
When an operation declares exact SVG hash equality as evidence, any drift fails.

fixedLayoutExamRules.description: KICE-style fixed-layout exam sheets must preserve visible body layout. QA markers or proof text inserted into the question body are hard failures even when save/readback succeeds.
forbiddenBodyMarkers: edited via Hancom Office HWP UI

rendererNotes: OfficeCLI CI does not yet ship a stable HWP/HWPX renderer. Until it does, visual claims require an explicit render evidence link in expected-capabilities.json. The threshold contract above remains authoritative when a renderer is connected.
